query:
-- 1. Deactivate Madison + Keith. Append a dated reason to notes (preserves history).
UPDATE tutors
   SET active = 0,
       notes  = CONCAT(COALESCE(notes,''),
                       CASE WHEN notes IS NULL OR notes='' THEN '' ELSE ' | ' END,
                       '2026-05-15: deactivated — Sophie is the only tutor going forward; Mom + Grandma take over after school year ends.')
 WHERE id IN (510001, 510002)        -- Madison, Keith
   AND active = 1;

-- 2. Confirm tutor table state (Sophie should be the only active tutor now)
SELECT id, name, role, active, LEFT(notes, 200) AS notes_preview
FROM tutors
WHERE active = 1 OR id IN (510001, 510002, 60009)
ORDER BY active DESC, name;

-- 3. Update this-week (May 11) override to reflect Sophie-only + Mom/Grandma helpers
UPDATE tutorRosterOverride
   SET active_tutor_names_json = JSON_ARRAY('Sophie'),
       helper_names_json       = JSON_ARRAY('Mom','Grandma'),
       note = 'Sophie is the only tutor for the rest of the school year. Standing schedule: Mon/Thu/Fri 10–3, Tue 10–3 (Tue May 19 is shortened to 10–1, one-time), Wed off. Mom + Grandma help on Wed and after school year ends.'
 WHERE week_start_date = '2026-05-11';

-- 4. Create next week's (May 18) override row. Use INSERT ... ON DUPLICATE so this is idempotent if I ever rerun it.
INSERT INTO tutorRosterOverride
  (week_start_date, active_tutor_names_json, helper_names_json, note, created_at)
VALUES
  ('2026-05-18',
   JSON_ARRAY('Sophie'),
   JSON_ARRAY('Mom','Grandma'),
   'Sophie 10–3 Mon, 10–1 Tue (shortened, one-time), Wed off, 10–3 Thu, 10–3 Fri. Mom + Grandma help on Wed.',
   UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW())*1000)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  active_tutor_names_json = VALUES(active_tutor_names_json),
  helper_names_json       = VALUES(helper_names_json),
  note                    = VALUES(note);

-- 5. Confirm both override rows
SELECT id, week_start_date, active_tutor_names_json, helper_names_json, LEFT(note, 300) AS note_preview
FROM tutorRosterOverride
WHERE week_start_date IN ('2026-05-11','2026-05-18')
ORDER BY week_start_date;
